nasb.text: Thus the sons of Israel were subdued at that time, and the sons of Judah conquered because they trusted in the Lord, the God of their fathers.

esv.text: Thus the men of Israel were subdued at that time, and the men of Judah prevailed, because they relied on the Lord, the God of their fathers.

cnv.text: 那時，以色列人被擊敗了，猶大人獲得勝利，因為他們倚靠耶和華他們列祖的　神。

ccb.text: 这样，以色列人被击败，犹大人因为倚靠他们祖先的上帝耶和华而大获全胜。
